EmailTemplate.name: Experience Cloud: Headless Forgot Password Email
EmailTemplate.subject: Finish resetting your {!Community_Name} password
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Finish resetting your password
Hi {!User.FirstName},
Enter this one-time password where prompted for {!Receiving_User.Username}:
{!Verification_Code}
If you did not request this change, contact your {!Community_Name} administrator.
Thanks, Team FIMBY
Family In My Backyard
